prerequisites.value: Wis 15, Combat Meditation, Meditation Master, character level 11th.

description.value: **Benefit:** When you meditate, you gain a +2 insight bonus instead of a +1 insight bonus. You can split this bonus between any two d20 rolls made over the duration of the feat that you used to meditate, adding +1 to each d20 roll, or using the full bonus on any one d20 roll, adding +2 to that single roll.
